summary: Completed testing of TrustOffice P1 features. All 36 backend tests pass (100%). New P1 features verified: PDF generation for minutes with preview modal and download button, 30-day historical health score chart, updated Governance page with 5-criteria display and scoring guide.
passed_tests: Backend API: User login with test credentials (200)
Backend API: 5-criteria governance health score returns correct structure
Backend API: Distribution approval without solvency fails (400)
Backend API: Distribution approval without recusal fails (400)
Backend API: Distribution approval with both confirmations succeeds (200)
Backend API: Minutes PDF returns valid base64 PDF (200) - P1 Feature
Backend API: Minutes PDF for nonexistent returns 404
Backend API: Create minutes and generate PDF workflow (200)
Backend API: Governance history returns 30-day daily scores (200) - P1 Feature
Backend API: Governance history with custom days parameter (200)
Backend API: Governance history for nonexistent trust returns 404
Frontend: Minutes page - PDF button visible for each minutes entry
Frontend: Minutes page - PDF preview modal opens with Download button
Frontend: Governance page - 5-criteria assessment with checkmarks
Frontend: Governance page - 30-Day Trend chart renders with SVG
Frontend: Governance page - How Scoring Works guide shows 5 criteria (20 pts each)
seed_data_creation: Demo data loaded via 'Use Demo Data' button
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 features verified working: 1) PDF generation for minutes - /api/minutes/{id}/pdf returns valid base64 PDF, preview modal opens with Download button. 2) 30-day historical health score chart - /api/governance/{id}/history returns daily score snapshots, SVG chart renders correctly. 3) Governance page updated with 5-criteria display (Quarterly Minutes, Task Compliance, Compensation Alignment, Distribution Documentation, Annual Review - 20 pts each), scoring guide, and score ranges legend.

elements: PDF button on each minutes entry
minutes_pdf_generation.details: Returns valid base64 encoded PDF with %PDF header

governance_history_chart.details: Returns daily score snapshots with date, score (0-100), and color (red/yellow/green)

criteria.name: Annual Review
criteria.description: Annual review completed in last 12 months
